summary: Audited the first-batch Sichuan Baosheng business-flow surface against the upgraded permission baseline. PM, executive, and business-admin paths are usable and aligned with the clarified policy, but finance still inherits project-facing operator authority through the owner path.

notes: Finance currently inherits owner-path project-facing operator authority.
PM and executive align with the upgraded boundary.

next_step: Open a narrow governance batch to decide whether finance should remain on the owner/project-facing operator path or be decoupled to a finance-only + cross-domain-read baseline.
